citation: Schubert, T., Friedmann, F., & Regenbrecht, H. (2001). The experience of presence: Factor analytic insights. Presence: Teleoperators and Virtual Environments, 10(3), 266-281.

scale_anchors.description: Bipolar anchors; 0 = left anchor, 6 = right anchor, 3 = midpoint

notes: Higher subscale scores (closer to 6) indicate stronger presence.
GP is a single global item and not averaged with subscales.
SP and INV together capture the attentional/spatial allocation aspect of presence.
REAL captures plausibility and perceptual fidelity of the virtual environment.
Validated across multiple VR platforms; widely used as gold-standard self-report measure.
